description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a geometric, boxy design. The exterior features a combination of white and gray walls with brown accent panels, large glass windows, and a prominent balcony on the upper floor. The house sits on a landscaped plot with green lawn areas and a paved driveway leading to a recessed garage. The rear of the house includes a patio area and what appears to be a small pool or water feature. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some spanning floor-to-ceiling, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic. The entryway is defined by a set of steps, a covered porch, and a minimalist door design.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, brown accent panels, and a landscaped yard with a driveway and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, steps, driveway, and prominent balcony with brown accent panels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage entrance, side windows, and the sloped landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio, large glass windows, and a small pool or water feature.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, side windows, and the continuation of the driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist entry with steps, covered porch, and a simple modern door
